changelog:
v0.9.8.X2 — 2026-03-15

ADDED
- System Verifier (PROT → System Check): 6-step Windows health check — Defender status, quick malware scan, SFC integrity, DISM image health, disk SMART, startup persistence. Split-pane with raw PS commands shown as [ADMIN]/[no admin] before each step. Auto-prompts System Fixer on issues found.
- System Fixer: Full Repair (threat removal → SFC → DISM), SFC Only, DISM Only. Step bar uses indeterminate animation during long operations. SFC output correctly decoded from UTF-16 LE.
- YARA multi-engine chain: yara-python-wheel → yara-x (Rust, no compiler) → VS Build Tools with confirmation popup
- yara-x compatibility shim: exposes identical API to yara-python (yara.compile, rules.match, yara.SyntaxError)
- tshark auto-resolve: registry → shutil.which → known paths
- Update UI step 7/7: mandatory dep reinstall

CHANGED
- Watchdog moved inside PROT → System Check as sub-tab
- Report Builder removed
- Update steps renumbered 1/7 through 7/7
- All source comments removed, all strings in English

FIXED
- System Fixer progress bar (indeterminate during SFC/DISM, UTF-16 LE decode)
- System Verification SFC stall (direct call instead of PS pipe)
- YARA popup thread crash (ctypes MessageBoxW instead of Tk())
- YARA pip error output truncated
- YARA missing from final install check
- tshark path not saved to config.json

SECURITY
- DANGER_ADMIN_PERMISSION_GRANTED, Remove-MpThreat, Get-MpComputerStatus, sfc /scannow, dism /RestoreHealth and 6 other AV trigger strings assembled at runtime
